query_basis: Programs table rows with verified state program evidence.
Waiver-like program rows or fallback to verified program rows when the state stores waiver entry in the general spine.
Verified early-intervention or Part C agency rows.
Verified regional education or district pages with special-education routing.

samples.sample_name: Connecticut State Department of Education Special Education

query_basis: Reviewed live official Connecticut education routing surfaces and preserved the current public EdSight district-finder shell plus the authenticated OrgSearchReport endpoint as the remaining blocker evidence.
blocker_evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-22 bounded live checks on the current Public EdSight district-finder shell https://public-edsight.ct.gov/overview/find-schools/find-school-district and its linked official OrgSearchReport endpoint https://edsight.ct.gov/SASStoredProcess/do?_keyword=&_program=%2FCTDOE%2FEdSight%2FRelease%2FReporting%2FPublic%2FReports%2FStoredProcesses%2FOrgSearchReport_SiteCore&orgtype=&orgdistrict=&orgname=Hartford&_select=Submit. The public shell renders anonymous navigation only, while the direct district query bounces to SAS Logon instead of returning public district records, so the official state directory surface still does not preserve county- or district-grade routing contacts that can replace Connecticut's statewide SDE fallback rows.

samples.evidence_snippet: The public finder shell loads, but it does not expose anonymous district-grade routing contacts by itself.
The direct district query returns SAS Logon rather than anonymous district search results.

query_basis: Verified programs with VR or Pre-ETS context.
Reviewed first-party Disability Rights Connecticut evidence on disk explicitly preserves Connecticut Protection and Advocacy designation text.

samples.evidence_snippet: DRCT is Connecticut's designated Protection & Advocacy System for individuals with disabilities in Connecticut.

query_basis: Reviewed first-party Disability Rights Connecticut evidence on disk explicitly preserves statewide legally based advocacy services plus direct help-routing pages.

samples.evidence_snippet: DRCT, together with other state Protection & Advocacy agencies, make up the nation’s largest provider of legally based advocacy services for people with disabilities.

query_basis: Verified ABLE program pages from the program spine.
Reviewed 2026-06-22 live official DDS Regions hub plus the North, South, and West general-contact leaves and derived a county-to-region routing map from the counties-served text on the hub.
